summary: Defined a local-only M7 save migration compatibility boundary in save-format, validated M1-M6 accepted save envelopes plus the M7 Beta content-lock candidate manifest, and locked cloud/account/network/telemetry/secrets/provider surfaces behind Human Gate and security review without implementing cloud save.

tests_run.result: Final status shows allowed task changes only: M packages/save-format/package.json; M packages/save-format/src/index.ts; M tests/protocol-command-query-schema.test.ts; ?? tests/save-migration-cloud-boundaries.test.ts; ?? project/messages/outbox/M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001__MSG-20260629-M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-WRITER-REVIEW__systems_architect.json. Initial pre-edit status was clean.
Listed task registry successfully; M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 is IN_PROGRESS with systems_architect owner.
M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 DRAFT test_engineer Establish the M7 UI and localization regression matrix

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001

tests_run.result: Vitest passed: 3 test files, 27 tests. Included save-format-v1, save-load-contract, and save-migration-cloud-boundaries.
Vitest passed: 1 test file, 14 tests. Cloud/account/remote/telemetry worker message probes reject as unknown message types.
Architecture boundaries passed; deterministic Node/Worker save-load, M4, M5, and M6 hashes matched; root Vitest passed 42 files and 351 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file and 9 tests.
Electron security preferences passed; preload exposes only monsoonDesktop; renderer navigation restricted; allowed IPC channels remain desktop:getRuntimeInfo and desktop:setFullscreen.
Prettier format check, ESLint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed.

decisions: M7 migration validation only approves local-compatible-load-only for accepted M1-M6 save manifests; it does not alter Save Envelope v1 or snapshot schema versions.

M7 Beta content-lock candidate manifests are recognized for review but route to Human Gate and security_reviewer before any automatic migration, irreversible migration, or frozen save/platform decision.
Cloud save remains candidate-boundary-only; implemented capability list is required to stay empty and unsafe request modes route to Human Gate/security review.
risks: The compatibility boundary is validation evidence, not formal content lock acceptance or release readiness.
Future real migration plans must still supply accepted manifest hashes, security review, and Human Gate approval before irreversible or account/cloud-backed behavior.
requested_action: Review the save migration compatibility boundary, cloud-save non-implementation boundary, protocol rejection coverage, and Electron/security implications before lead integration.
